title: Robust Resinous Middle Eastern Rest Meat Tabbouleh
description: A festive Middle Eastern dish featuring rest meat, fish sauce, and fresh herbs, served in a large paella pan. This sugar-free friendly tabbouleh is perfect for special occasions.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large paella pan, combine the bulgur, salt, and black pepper.
In a small bowl, whisk together the fish sauce, nam pla, lemon juice, and olive oil.
Pour the sauce mixture over the bulgur mixture and stir to combine.
Add the chopped parsley and mint to the paella pan and stir to combine.
Add the cooked and diced rest meat to the paella pan and stir to combine.
Transfer the paella pan to the preheated oven and bake for 20 minutes.
Remove the paella pan from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes.
Serve the tabbouleh hot, garnished with additional parsley and mint if desired.
